meta.note: Liv's meal plan + smart shopping list. Built from Iris's summer_recipes.md. Edit freely in the app — every change commits straight back to GitHub. No fish. Ever. 🐟❌

weekend_free.label: Weekend — your call!
weekend_free.note: Lazy Saturday. Porridge, toast, or whatever you fancy.

noodle_salad_leftovers.label: Cold noodle salad (leftovers)
noodle_salad_leftovers.note: Sunday lunch sorted — straight from the fridge.

chilli_rice_tub.label: Chilli over rice (tub)
chilli_rice_tub.note: A third of the chilli over a mug of rice — grab Tuesday morning.

arrabbiata_cold.label: Cold arrabbiata (tub)
arrabbiata_cold.note: The chilli mellows overnight — genuinely lovely cold.

mexican_bowl_cold.label: Mexican bowl (tub)
mexican_bowl_cold.note: Rice soaks up the bean juices overnight. You'll look forward to this one.

chilli_potato_tub.label: Chilli + baked potato (tub)
chilli_potato_tub.note: A third of the chilli + a baked potato — reheat both at work.

bruschetta_cold.label: Bruschetta (desk assembly)
bruschetta_cold.note: Tomato mix in one tub, bread separate — toast at work and pile it on!

open_lunch.label: Open — use things up
open_lunch.note: Whatever needs eating, leftovers, or grab something out.

butterbean_tub.label: Butterbean stew (tub)
butterbean_tub.note: From Sunday's huge batch — better every day.

stirfry_tub.label: Stir fry + rice (tub)
stirfry_tub.note: Rice not noodles — stays lovely in a tub.

recipes.name: Porridge at the Desk

ingredients.note: 40g a morning — buy if running low
the favourite topping — buy if low

steps: 40g porridge oats + 250ml water or milk (or half and half).
Microwave 2–3 mins, stir halfway.
Top with sliced banana + honey (THE FAVOURITE), or apple + cinnamon, or frozen berries, or just honey for lazy mornings.

recipes.name: Eggs on Toast
recipes.fat: Poached or boiled to keep it low fat
recipes.lunchNote: Weekend breakfast + Saturday lunch — easy and filling.
steps: Toast 2 slices of bread.
Poach or boil 2 eggs (poached keeps the fat down).
Eggs on toast, pinch of salt and pepper. Done.

recipes.name: Cold Noodle Salad
recipes.fat: Under 5g — no oil in the dressing 💛
recipes.lunchNote: Make the full batch — half is Sunday lunch sorted.

ingredients.note: frozen — lasts weeks, shared with snacks

steps: Cook noodles per packet, drain, run under cold water until fully cool.
Grate/matchstick the carrot, strip the cucumber, slice spring onions.
Defrost edamame in boiling water 2 mins.
Toss everything with soy sauce, lime juice, sweet chilli and a sprinkle of sesame seeds. Eat cold.

recipes.name: Loaded Sweet Potato + Bean Chilli
recipes.lunchNote: Makes 3 — a loaded sweet potato tonight, a baked-potato tub for Monday, a rice tub for Tuesday. 📦📦

ingredients.qty: 1 tin (400g) — or black beans, drained & rinsed
½ tsp — stir well, it CLUMPS!!

steps: 🫒 Spray oil in a saucepan.
🧅 Fry the onion 5 mins until soft.
🧄 Add garlic, pepper, cumin, smoked paprika and chilli flakes — fry 1 min.
🍅 Tin of tomatoes in.
🫘 Beans in, stir.
⏰ Simmer 20 mins with the lid slightly off until thick.
🫙 Add the soy sauce, stir.
🧊 Add the stock cube or bouillon, stir until dissolved.
🫙 Add ½ tsp Marmite, stir well — it CLUMPS if you don’t!!
🧂 Season with salt and pepper.
🍋 Squeeze of half a lime.
🌿 Garnish with fresh torn coriander.

🍠 Sunday dinner — 1 large sweet potato: if large, microwave 5 mins then airfryer 30 mins (regular: airfryer 35–40 mins). Fork-test the DEEPEST part — if there’s resistance, cook more. Split, load with a third of the chilli + coriander.
🥔 Monday lunch tub — 1 regular potato in the airfryer ~45 mins. Potato + a third of the chilli in separate tubs, fridge Sunday night, reheat both at work.
📦 Tuesday lunch tub — cook 75g dry rice (~a mug cooked), a third of the chilli on top, fridge and grab Tuesday morning.
🍠 Size guide — Regular: airfryer 35–40 mins, squeeze test works. LARGE: microwave 5 mins FIRST then airfryer 30 mins, and use the FORK TEST — the outside LIES on big ones!!

recipes.name: Shakshuka
recipes.lunchNote: Doesn’t travel — but that’s fine, Tuesday’s chilli tub is already sorted!
steps: 🫒 Spray oil in a frying pan with a LID.
🧅 Fry the onion 5 mins.
🧄 Add the garlic and spices, fry 30 seconds.
🍅 Pour in the tomatoes, simmer 10 mins until THICK.
🫙 Add soy sauce, ground coriander and a tiny sprinkle of MSG, stir.
🧂 Taste and season with salt and pepper.
🥄 Make 2 dips with a spoon, crack an egg into each.
⏰ Lid ON, cook 4 minutes on Liv’s hob (NOT 5.5!!).
👀 Check — whites SET, yolks still RUNNY.
🌿 Garnish with torn fresh coriander and a squeeze of lime.
🍞 Eat straight from the PAN with bread!!

recipes.name: Pasta Arrabbiata
recipes.lunchNote: Half hot tonight, half cold in a tub tomorrow.
steps: 🍝 Cook ALL the pasta per packet instructions.
🫒 While it boils — spray oil in a pan.
🧄 Fry the garlic and chilli flakes on medium 1 min — DON’T BURN THE GARLIC!!
🌶️ Add the cayenne pepper, stir.
🍅 Pour in the tomatoes, add a pinch of sugar.
⏰ Simmer 10 mins until thick.
🧂 Add a tiny sprinkle of MSG, season with salt to taste.
🍝 Drain the pasta, toss through the sauce.
🌿 Fresh basil on top if you have it.

recipes.name: Mexican Rice Bowl
recipes.lunchNote: The BEST leftover on the list — tub half; the rice soaks up the bean juices overnight.
steps: 🫘 Warm the beans with cumin, paprika, chilli powder, garlic powder, lime and a splash of water — 3–4 mins.
🫑 Diced pepper in WITH the beans.
🍚 Microwave the rice pouch — 90 seconds.
🍅 Chop all the fresh stuff while the beans warm.
🍚 Rice in a bowl, beans on top, fresh stuff on, salsa on, jalapeños on TOP.
📦 Thursday tub — half of everything into a tub; it soaks up the bean juices overnight.

recipes.name: Tomato Bruschetta 👑
recipes.lunchNote: Tomato mix in ONE tub, bread SEPARATE — toast at work, assemble at your desk. NEVER pre-assemble, it goes soggy!

ingredients.qty: 1 clove — halved, rubbed on the hot toast

steps: 🍅 TOMATO MIX FIRST: dice the tomatoes, finely dice the red onion, tear the basil. Squeeze the lemon in through your fingers (catches the seeds!). Salt, pepper, MSG. Stir.
⏰ LET IT SIT 10 MINUTES — the juices mingle. This is the whole trick.
🍞 Thick slices of tiger bloomer, drizzle with olive oil, under the grill.
🔥👀 WATCH IT — golden to burnt is about 30 seconds. Flip; the second side is faster.
🧄 THE MAGIC STEP: the second it's out, rub the cut garlic clove over the hot toast.
🍅 Pile the tomato mix HIGH. Drizzle balsamic glaze; streak of harissa if you want heat.
🍽️ EAT IMMEDIATELY.
📦 For the tub: tomato mix in ONE tub, bread SEPARATE. Toast & assemble at your desk.

recipes.name: Sweet Chilli Quorn Pittas
recipes.fat: Lower fat than fried falafel — kinder on gallstones 💛
recipes.lunchNote: NO TUB — it is the weekend tomorrow!! 🎉
steps: 🍗 Cook the Quorn chicken pieces per packet (oven/airfryer ~15–20 mins).
🌶️ Toss the hot Quorn in sweet chilli sauce.
🥙 Warm the pittas, split open.
🥬 Stuff with shredded lettuce, tomatoes, cucumber, red onion.
🍗 Pile in the sweet chilli Quorn. Done!!

recipes.name: Greek Orzo Salad
recipes.lunchNote: Sat dinner + Sun lunch — it gets BETTER overnight. 🧊 Half straight into a tub.
steps: 🍚 Boil the orzo per pack (~8 mins). Drain and rinse under COLD water — stops it clumping. Drain WELL.
🔪 While it cooks: dice pepper, cucumber, red onion. Halve the tomatoes, slice the olives, chop the parsley.
🍋 DRESSING in the bottom of a big bowl: whisk lemon juice + zest, red wine vinegar, 1 tsp olive oil, garlic powder, salt, pepper, MSG. (The acid does the work — that's why it only needs 1 tsp oil.)
🥣 Tip the cold orzo in, stir so every grain gets coated.
🥗 Add the veg, olives and parsley. Fold through. Taste — more lemon? salt? MSG?
📦 Half into a tub for Sunday.

recipes.name: Smoky Butterbean Stew
recipes.lunchNote: The Week 2 chilli. ONE huge Sunday batch = 4 meals (Sun dinner + Mon lunch + Tue dinner + Wed lunch). 📦📦 Liquid smoke is the secret. 🔥

ingredients.qty: ½ tsp — START HERE, it's POWERFUL

steps: 🫒 Spray a big pan. Soften the onion 5 mins. Add garlic + peppers, 3 more mins.
🌶️ Tomato purée, smoked paprika, oregano, thyme in. Stir 1 min — let the spices TOAST, it wakes them up.
🥫 Tins of tomatoes in. Stock in. Sugar in. Salt, pepper, MSG.
🫘 Butter beans in — stir gently, don't smash them.
🔥 Liquid smoke: ½ tsp. STIR. TASTE. Add more only if it needs it.
⏰ Simmer 25–30 mins uncovered until THICK and glossy, not watery.
🍋 Lemon juice at the END — off the heat. It lifts the whole thing.
🍞 Parsley on top, crusty bread to dunk.
📦 THREE portions into tubs — it gets better every single day.

recipes.name: Veggie Paella-ish Rice
recipes.lunchNote: Mon dinner + Tue lunch. 📦 Don't stir it while it simmers — that's what makes it paella.
steps: 🫒 Spray a wide pan. Onion 5 mins. Garlic + peppers 3 mins. Mushrooms 4 mins — let them go golden, don't crowd them.
☀️ Smoked paprika + turmeric + oregano. Stir 1 min to toast.
🍚 Rice in — stir so every grain gets coated in the spices.
🥫 Tinned tomatoes + stock. Salt, pepper, MSG. Stir ONCE.
🔥 Simmer 15 mins with a lid on. DON'T STIR IT — the bottom goes slightly crispy, that's the magic.
🫛 Peas + butter beans on top. Lid back on, 5 more mins.
😌 Off the heat, lid on, rest 5 mins. Fork through, parsley, BIG squeeze of lemon.
📦 Half in a tub for Tuesday.

recipes.name: Stir Fry + Rice
recipes.lunchNote: Wed dinner + Thu lunch. 📦 Rice NOT noodles — noodles go soggy in a tub!
steps: 🍚 Rice ON FIRST — 12–15 mins.
🥣 The sauce: mix soy, honey, sweet chilli, rice vinegar, MSG in a mug. Set aside.
🔥 Spray a wok, get it HOT. Mushrooms in first — 4 mins until golden.
🧄 Garlic + ginger — 30 seconds, don't burn it.
🧊 Frozen veg straight in from the freezer. 4–5 mins, keep it moving, until hot with a bit of BITE.
🫘 Edamame in, 2 mins.
✨ Sauce in — toss 1 min until everything's glossy.
🌰 Rice in the bowl, stir fry on top, spring onions + sesame seeds.
📦 Half in a tub for Thursday.

recipes.name: Quorn Fajitas
recipes.lunchNote: Friday treat. NO cheese, NO sour cream — the mission. 📉
steps: 🔥 Spray a pan, get it HOT. Onion + pepper 5 mins — let them CHAR a bit at the edges. That's the fajita flavour.
🍄 Mushrooms — 4 mins.
🧊 Quorn pieces straight from frozen — 5–6 mins until hot through.
🌶️ Smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, oregano, salt, pepper, MSG. Stir 1 min.
🫘 Black beans in, 2 mins to warm through.
🍋 Lime juice off the heat.
🌯 Warm the wraps. Load: lettuce, filling, salsa. NO cheese, NO sour cream.

available.name: Rice cakes with jam or salsa

connections.label: Sun chilli → Monday potato tub (+ a Tuesday rice tub!)
Thu Mexican bowl → Friday tub (the BEST leftover!!)

saturday.text: Scoop half the noodle salad into a tub for Sunday lunch (optional — Sunday can be snacky too).

sunday.text: Big batch tonight!! Potato + a third of the chilli in separate tubs for Monday. The chilli keeps, so you can prep Tuesday’s rice tub now too.

monday.text: NO TUB tonight — shakshuka doesn’t travel, and Tuesday’s chilli tub is already prepped!

tuesday.text: Half the pasta straight into a tub for Wednesday — lid on, fridge.

wednesday.text: Tomato mix in ONE tub, bread SEPARATE — toast & assemble at your desk tomorrow!

thursday.text: Half of everything — rice, beans, salsa, fresh bits — into a tub. The best one.

connections.label: Sun stew → Mon/Tue/Wed (one batch, four meals!!)

saturday.text: Half the orzo into a tub for Sunday — it gets BETTER overnight. 🧊

sunday.text: HUGE batch night! THREE tubs of butterbean stew — Mon lunch, Tue dinner, Wed lunch. 📦📦📦

monday.text: Half the paella into a tub for Tuesday lunch.

tuesday.text: NO TUB — Wednesday's butterbean is already waiting from Sunday's batch!

wednesday.text: Half the stir fry into a tub for Thursday (rice not noodles — it stays lovely).

thursday.text: Bruschetta tub — tomato mix in ONE tub, bread SEPARATE. Assemble at your desk!
